---
title: "LMU Open Science Center"
toc: false
repo-actions: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 0px
      body-width: 1250px
      margin-width: 200px
      gutter-width: 2em
title-block-banner: "assets/img/osc_image_assets/Banner1.jpg"
# listing:
#   - id: news-carousel
#     template: news/news.ejs
#     contents: news/news
#     sort: "date desc"
#   - id: events-carousel
#     template: events/events.ejs
#     contents: events/events/*.qmd
#     sort: "date desc"
listing:
  - id: testimonial-carousel
    template: testimonials-carousel-template.ejs
    contents: testimonials.yaml
include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/remove_title.js" defer></script>
  - text: |
      <script>
      (function () {
        function equalizeTextBySelector(selector, scopeRoot) {
          var elements = Array.prototype.slice.call(scopeRoot.querySelectorAll(selector));
          if (!elements.length) return;

          elements.forEach(function (el) { el.style.minHeight = ''; });

          var maxHeight = 0;
          elements.forEach(function (el) {
            maxHeight = Math.max(maxHeight, el.getBoundingClientRect().height);
          });

          var heightPx = Math.ceil(maxHeight) + 'px';
          elements.forEach(function (el) { el.style.minHeight = heightPx; });
        }

        function runEqualization() {
          window.requestAnimationFrame(function () {
            var isSideBySide = window.matchMedia('(min-width: 768px)').matches;

            if (isSideBySide) {
              equalizeTextBySelector(
                '#newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title, #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title',
                document
              );
              equalizeTextBySelector(
                '#newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text, #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text',
                document
              );
              return;
            }

            equalizeTextBySelector('#newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title', document);
            equalizeTextBySelector('#eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title', document);
            equalizeTextBySelector('#newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text', document);
            equalizeTextBySelector('#eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text', document);
          });
        }

        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', runEqualization);
        window.addEventListener('load', runEqualization);
        window.addEventListener('resize', runEqualization);
      })();
      </script>
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <script src="assets/javascript/impact_counter.js" defer></script>
      <style>
      /* =============================================
         banner overlay
         ============================================= */
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        background-position-y: center;
        height: 400px;
        position: relative;
        margin-bottom: 0;
        
      }
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner::after {
        content: '';
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        background: linear-gradient(
          135deg,
          rgba(0,65,28,0.08) 0%,
          rgba(0,136,59,0.03) 60%,
          rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%
        );
        pointer-events: none;
      }

      /* =============================================
         shared style component
         ============================================= */
          .card {
            background-color: #fcfcfc !important;
          }
          .osc-section {
            padding: 2rem 2rem 0;
          }

          .osc-section + .osc-section {
            margin-top: 1rem;
          }

          .osc-section h1 {
            font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.25rem);
            font-weight: 700;
            line-height: 1.2;
          }
          .osc-section h2,
          .explore-section h2 {
            font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 1.75rem);
            font-weight: 700;       
            color: #00883A;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            border-bottom:none;
          }
          .section-title {
            font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.5vw, 1.6rem);
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.5;
          }
          .desc.fs-5{
            font-size: 1.125rem !important; 
            font-weight: 500;
            color: #666;
            line-height: 1.7;
            letter-spacing: 0.01em;

          }
          .explore-card .card-title,
          .carousel-card .card-title{
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 700;       
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
          }

          .explore-card .card-title{
            color: #00883A;
          }

          .carousel-card .card-title{
            color: #555;
          }

          .explore-card .card-text,
          .carousel-card .card-text{
            font-size: 0.9375rem;
            color: #555;   
            line-height: 1.65;
          }

          .explore-card a.fw-semibold,
          .carousel-card a.fw-semibold{
            font-size: 0.89rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.03em;
            color: #00883A;
          }

          .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary,
          .carousel-card .btn.btn-sm{
            background: #00883A;
            color: white !important;
            border-color: #00883A;
            transition: transform .15s ease;
          }
          .mission-statement-btn.btn.btn-primary:hover,
          .carousel-card .btn.btn-sm:hover {
            transform: scale(1.05);
          }

      /* =============================================
         mission
         ============================================= */
          h3 {
            border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
            padding-bottom: .5rem;
          }
          .mission-checklist {
            list-style: none;
          }
          .mission-checklist ul {
            padding-left: 0;
            margin-left: 0;
          }     
          .mission-checklist li {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.65rem;
            align-items: flex-start;
            font-size: 1rem;       
            color: #444;
            font-weight: 400;
            line-height: 1.75;
          }
          .mission-check-icon {
            width: 18px; 
            height: 18px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: #f4f1f1;
            color: #00883A;
            font-size: 0.6rem;
          }

      /* =============================================
         newsletter section
         ============================================= */

         .newsletter-section {
          background: #00883A;
          border-radius: 20px;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        .newsletter-section h4 {
          font-size: 1.3rem;
          letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .newsletter-section p {
          font-size: 0.9375rem;   
          font-weight: 400;
          line-height: 1.6;
          opacity: 0.92;      
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn {
          transition: color 0.25s ease;       
          cursor: pointer;                        
        }

        .newsletter-btn.btn.btn-outline-light:hover{
          background: #ffffff50 !important;
          color: white !important;
          border: 1px solid white !important;
        }


      /* =============================================
         impact section
         ============================================= */
          .impact-container {
            background: #ecf4ec38;
          }
          .impact-container .metric-value {
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            color: #00883A;
            line-height: 1;
            font-weight: 700;
          }
          .impact-container .metric-label {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            color: #555;  
          }
      /* =============================================
         testimonial
         ============================================= */

          .testimonial-inner blockquote {
            border-left: 1px solid #d5d3d394;
            color: #666;
          }
          .testimonial-inner blockquote p{
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.125rem);
            font-style: italic;
            line-height: 1.7;
           }
          .testimonial-inner strong {
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: 0.06em;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel {
            max-width: 900px;
            margin: 0 auto;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-item {
            padding: 0.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .testimonial-inner blockquote p {
            line-height: 1.6;
            min-height: calc(1.6em * 5);
            max-height: calc(1.6em * 5);
            overflow: hidden;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 5;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-prev,
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-next {
            width: 2.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-prev-icon,
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-control-next-icon {
            filter: invert(38%) sepia(74%) saturate(1200%) hue-rotate(104deg) brightness(92%) contrast(101%);
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-indicators {
            margin-bottom: -1.5rem;
          }
          .testimonial-carousel .carousel-indicators [data-bs-target] {
            background-color: #00883A;
          }
          .testimonial-image img {
              width: 110px;
              aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
              object-fit: cover;
              border-radius: 50%;
          }
      /* =============================================
         explore cards
         ============================================= */
        .explore-card {
          position: relative;
          transition: 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
          background: white;
        }

        .explore-card::after {
          content: "";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          width: 0;              
          height: 3px; 
          background-color: #00883A;
          border-radius: 12px;
          transition: width 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
        }

        .explore-card:hover::after {
          width: 100%;            
        }

        .explore-card:hover {
          box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
          transform: translateY(-3px);
        }

      /* =============================================
         news carousel
         ============================================= */
        #newsCardCarousel,
        #eventsCardCarousel {
          padding-bottom: 3rem;
          --carousel-max-title-lines: 2;
          --carousel-max-body-lines: 3;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-subtitle,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-subtitle {
          overflow-wrap: anywhere;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-subtitle,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-subtitle {
          display: -webkit-box;
          -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
          -webkit-line-clamp: 1;
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-text {
          display: -webkit-box;
          -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
          -webkit-line-clamp: var(--carousel-max-body-lines);
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-item .card-title {
          display: -webkit-box;
          -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
          -webkit-line-clamp: var(--carousel-max-title-lines);
          overflow: hidden;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev-icon,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next-icon,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev-icon,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next-icon {
          filter: brightness(0) saturate(100%);
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators {
          margin-bottom: 0;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators [data-bs-target],
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators [data-bs-target] {
          background-color: #000;
          opacity: 0.4;
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators .active,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-indicators .active {
          opacity: 1;
        }
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev {
          top: 87.5%;
          width: 25px;
          height: 25px;
          color: #000000e6;
          border: 1px solid #000000b3;
          border-radius: 50%;
          transition: background 0.2s;
        }
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev {
          left: 0; 
        }

        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next {
          left: 35px;  
          right: auto;   
        }
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next i,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev i,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next i,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev i {
          font-size: 0.75rem;
          line-height: 1;
        }
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next:hover,
        #newsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev:hover,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-next:hover,
        #eventsCardCarousel .carousel-control-prev:hover {
          background: #00883A;
          color: #fff;
          border-color: #00883A;
        }
        .carousel-card .card-header {
          font-size: 0.8rem;
          letter-spacing: 0.1em;
          color: #00883A;
          border-bottom:none;
        }
        .carousel-card .btn.btn-link {
          position: relative;
          text-decoration: none;
          display: inline-block;
        }

        .carousel-card .btn.btn-link::after {
          content: "";
          position: absolute;
          left: 0;
          bottom: 0;
          width: 0%;
          height: 2px;
          background-color: #00883A;
          transition: width 0.3s ease;
        }

        .carousel-card .btn.btn-link:hover::after {
          width: 100%;
        }
        </style>
      <link href="/assets/bootstrap-5.3.8-dist/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
css: /custom-navbar.css
---


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     MISSION + NEWSLETTER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}

::: {.row .align-items-center .gx-5 .no-side-padding}
::: {.col-lg-8}

# Our Mission {.mb-3}

### The researcher-led LMU Open Science Center (OSC) advances research excellence at LMU Munich by promoting open, responsible, and reproducible practices. {.mb-3 .section-title}

::: {.mission-checklist .d-flex .flex-column .gap-1 .p-0 .my-4}
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Essential training in the highest standards of reproducible research methods
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Digital sovereignty and resilience to global challenges through open source workflows
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Transparency as foundation for trust and evidence-based societal debates
- [✓]{.mission-check-icon .d-flex .flex-shrink-0 .align-items-center .justify-content-center .mt-1} Reliable scientific data as a critical foundation for responsible AI, digitalisation, and societal translation
:::

[Learn More About OSC](about/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .mission-statement-btn}

:::

::: {.col-lg-4}
::: {.newsletter-section .d-flex .flex-column .justify-content-center .text-center .p-5 .text-white .gap-1}

#### Stay updated with the OSC {.mb-3 .fw-semibold .text-white}

Sign up to our mailing list for the latest workshops, events, and resources.

[Subscribe](https://lists.lrz.de/mailman/listinfo/lmu-osc){.btn .btn-outline-light .newsletter-btn}

:::
:::
:::

:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     accolades plus testimonial carousel
════════════════════════════════════════ -->

::: {.container .impact-container .mt-3}
::: {.row .align-items-center}

::: {.col-lg-4}
::: {.row}

::: {.col-12 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="2000+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Researchers Trained
:::
:::

::: {.col-6 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="150+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Members
:::
:::

::: {.col-6 .text-center}
::: {.metric-value .mb-2 data-target="150+"}
0
:::
::: {.metric-label .text-uppercase .text-muted}
Publications
:::
:::

:::
:::

::: {.col-lg-8}
::: {.testimonial-carousel}

::: {#testimonial-carousel}
:::

:::
:::

:::
:::



<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     explore cards
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container .explore-section}


## What We Offer

::: {.mb-4 .desc .fs-5}
Whether you're a student, early-career researcher, or faculty — there's a place for you in the open science community.
:::

::: {.row .row-cols-1 .row-cols-lg-3 .g-4}

::: {.col}
```{=html}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
  <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
    <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2">
      <h5 class="mb-0 card-title">Community</h5>
      <div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 rounded-3 d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" style="width:50px;height:50px;color:#00883A;">
        <i class="bi bi-people fs-5"></i>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Meet the researchers, advocates, and partners shaping open science at LMU and beyond.</p>
    <a href="people/members.qmd" class="stretched-link" aria-label="Meet the OSC Community"></a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.col}
```{=html}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
  <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
    <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2">
      <h5 class="mb-0 card-title">Training & Workshops</h5>
      <div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 rounded-3 d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" style="width:50px;height:50px;color:#00883A;">
        <i class="bi bi-journal-bookmark fs-5"></i>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Build hands-on skills in reproducible research through OSC workshops, summer schools, and tutorials.</p>
    <a href="training/index.qmd" class="stretched-link"aria-label="Explore Training"></a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.col}
```{=html}
<div class="card explore-card h-100 border border-success-subtle rounded-3 shadow-sm">
  <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
    <div class="d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between mb-2">
      <h5 class="mb-0 card-title">Partners & Networks</h5>
      <div class="bg-success bg-opacity-10 rounded-3 d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center" style="width:50px;height:50px;color:#00883A;">
        <i class="bi bi-globe2 fs-5"></i>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Discover our institutional collaborators and the international networks we're part of.</p>
    <a href="partners/institutional-members.qmd" class="stretched-link" aria-label="See OSC Partners"></a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::
:::

:::
:::


<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════
     NEWS & EVENTS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
::: {.osc-section}
::: {.container}


## Stay In the Loop

::: {.mb-4 .desc .fs-5}
Keep up to date with our latest news releases, and upcoming events.
:::

::: {.row .g-4}

::: {.col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="card carousel-card h-100 border border-success-subtle">
  <div class="card-header bg-transparent fw-semibold text-uppercase">
    News
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <div id="newsCardCarousel" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="false">
      <div class="carousel-indicators">
        <button type="button" data-bs-target="#newsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active" aria-current="true" aria-label="Slide 1"></button>
        <button type="button" data-bs-target="#newsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="1" aria-label="Slide 2"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-inner">
        <div class="carousel-item active">
          <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary" style="font-size:0.87rem;">Jul 7, 2025</h6>
          <h5 class="card-title">Launching of LMU-FORRT Train-the-Trainer Program</h5>
          <p class="card-text">Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content. Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content. Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content.</p>
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-link p-0 fw-semibold small">Read More →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="carousel-item">
          <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary" style="font-size:0.87rem;">Mar 18, 2026</h6>
          <h5 class="card-title">Second news item</h5>
          <p class="card-text">Another example entry to demonstrate basic carousel behavior inside the card body.</p>
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-link p-0 fw-semibold small">Read More →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#newsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
      </button>
      <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#newsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer text-center bg-transparent">
    <a href="news/index.qmd" class="btn btn-success btn-sm w-50">All News</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

::: {.col-md-6}
```{=html}
<div class="card carousel-card h-100 border border-success-subtle">
  <div class="card-header bg-transparent fw-semibold text-uppercase">
    Events
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <div id="eventsCardCarousel" class="carousel slide" data-bs-ride="false">
      <div class="carousel-indicators">
        <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="0" class="active" aria-current="true" aria-label="Slide 1"></button>
        <button type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide-to="1" aria-label="Slide 2"></button>
      </div>
      <div class="carousel-inner">
        <div class="carousel-item active">
          <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary" style="font-size:0.87rem;">Workshop · Ludwig-Maximilians-Universitat Munchen</h6>
          <h5 class="card-title">Data & AI Ethics</h5>
          <p class="card-text">Some quick example text to build on the card title and make up the bulk of the card's content.</p>
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-link p-0 fw-semibold small">See Event →</a>
        </div>
        <div class="carousel-item">
          <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2 text-body-secondary" style="font-size:0.87rem;">Seminar · Ludwig-Maximilians-Universitat Munchen</h6>
          <h5 class="card-title">Reproducible Research Methods</h5>
          <p class="card-text">Another example event entry to demonstrate matching carousel behavior and card layout.</p>
          <a href="#" class="btn btn-link p-0 fw-semibold small">See Event →</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <button class="carousel-control-prev" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide="prev">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-left" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Previous</span>
      </button>
      <button class="carousel-control-next" type="button" data-bs-target="#eventsCardCarousel" data-bs-slide="next">
        <i class="bi bi-chevron-right" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        <span class="visually-hidden">Next</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="card-footer border-top-none text-center bg-transparent">
    <a href="events/index.qmd" class="btn btn-sm w-50">All Events</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
:::

:::

:::
:::
